        "labels": [

        ],
        "snippet": "\\begin{theorem}\n\\label{thm.fps.lim.sum-lim-conv}Let $\\left(  f_{0},f_{1},f_{2},\\ldots\\right)\n$ be a sequence of FPSs such that $\\lim\\limits_{i\\rightarrow\\infty}\\sum\n_{n=0}^{i}f_{n}$ exists. Then, the family $\\left(  f_{n}\\right)\n_{n\\in\\mathbb{N}}$ is summable, and satisfies%\n\\[\n\\sum_{n\\in\\mathbb{N}}f_{n}=\\lim\\limits_{i\\rightarrow\\infty}\\sum_{n=0}^{i}%\nf_{n}.\n\\]\n\n\\end{theorem}\n\n\\begin{theorem}\n\\label{thm.fps.lim.prod-lim-conv}Let $\\left(  f_{0},f_{1},f_{2},\\ldots\\right)\n$ be a sequence of FPSs such that $\\lim\\limits_{i\\rightarrow\\infty}\\prod\n_{n=0}^{i}f_{n}$ exists. Then, the family $\\left(  f_{n}\\right)\n_{n\\in\\mathbb{N}}$ is multipliable, and satisfies%\n\\[\n\\prod_{n\\in\\mathbb{N}}f_{n}=\\lim\\limits_{i\\rightarrow\\infty}\\prod_{n=0}%\n^{i}f_{n}.\n\\]\n\n\\end{theorem}\n"
      }
    ],

(namespace)\nnamespace PowerSeries\n\n-- File context: AlgebraicCombinatorics/Details/Limits.lean:73-73 (variable)\nvariable {K : Type*} [CommRing K]\n-- Local API retrieval: AlgebraicCombinatorics/Details/Limits.lean:194-212 (coeffStabilizesTo_add')\ntheorem coeffStabilizesTo_add'\n    {f g : ℕ → PowerSeries K} {lf lg : PowerSeries K}\n    (hf : CoeffStabilizesTo f lf) (hg : CoeffStabilizesTo g lg) :\n    CoeffStabilizesTo (fun i => f i + g i) (lf + lg) := by\n  intro n\n  -- Step 1: Get stabilization bounds for x^n-equivalence\n  obtain ⟨K_f, hK_f⟩ := exists_xnEquiv_of_coeffStabilizesTo hf n\n  obtain ⟨K_g, hK_g⟩ := exists_xnEquiv_of_coeffStabilizesTo hg n\n  -- Step 2: Take P = max{K_f, K_g}\n  let P := max K_f K_g\n  use P\n  intro i hi\n  -- Step 3: For i ≥ P, we have f_i ≡[x^n] lf and g_i ≡[x^n] lg\n  have hf_equiv : xnEquiv n (f i) lf := hK_f i (le_of_max_le_left hi)\n  have hg_equiv : xnEquiv n (g i) lg := hK_g i (le_of_max_le_right hi)\n  -- Step 4: By additivity, f_i + g_i ≡[x^n] lf + lg\n  have h_sum := xnEquiv_add hf_equiv hg_equiv\n  -- Step 5: Extract the n-th coefficient equality\n  exact h_sum n (le_refl n)\n-- Local API retrieval: AlgebraicCombinatorics/Details/Limits.lean:216-234 (coeffStabilizesTo_mul')\ntheorem coeffStabilizesTo_mul'\n    {f g : ℕ → PowerSeries K} {lf lg : PowerSeries K}\n    (hf : CoeffStabilizesTo f lf) (hg : CoeffStabilizesTo g lg) :\n    CoeffStabilizesTo (fun i => f i * g i) (lf * lg) := by\n  intro n\n  -- Step 1: Get stabilization bounds for x^n-equivalence\n  obtain ⟨K_f, hK_f⟩ := exists_xnEquiv_of_coeffStabilizesTo hf n\n  obtain ⟨K_g, hK_g⟩ := exists_xnEquiv_of_coeffStabilizesTo hg n\n  -- Step 2: Take P = max{K_f, K_g}\n  let P := max K_f K_g\n  use P\n  intro i hi\n  -- Step 3: For i ≥ P, we have f_i ≡[x^n] lf and g_i ≡[x^n] lg\n  have hf_equiv : xnEquiv n (f i) lf := hK_f i (le_of_max_le_left hi)\n  have hg_equiv : xnEquiv n (g i) lg := hK_g i (le_of_max_le_right hi)\n  -- Step 4: By multiplicativity, f_i * g_i ≡[x^n] lf * lg\n  have h_prod := xnEquiv_mul hf_equiv hg_equiv\n  -- Step 5: Extract the n-th coefficient equality\n  exact h_prod n (le_refl n)\n-- Local API retrieval: AlgebraicCombinatorics/Details/Limits.lean:286-289 (coeffStabilizesTo_partial_sum')\ntheorem coeffStabilizesTo_partial_sum'\n    {f : ℕ → PowerSeries K} (hf : IsSummable f) :\n    CoeffStabilizesTo (fun i => ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (i + 1), f j) (tsum' f hf) :=\n  coeffStabilizesTo_partial_sum hf\n-- Local API retrieval: AlgebraicCombinatorics/Details/Limits.lean:319-322 (coeffStabilizesTo_partial_prod')\ntheorem coeffStabilizesTo_partial_prod'\n    {f : ℕ → PowerSeries K} (hf : IsMultipliable f) :\n    CoeffStabilizesTo (fun i => ∏ j ∈ Finset.range (i + 1), f j) (tprod' f hf) :=\n  coeffStabilizesTo_partial_prod hf",
    "lean_environment": {

      "notation_contracts": [],
      "examples": [
        "theorem coeffStabilizesTo_partial_prod'\n    {f : ℕ → PowerSeries K} (hf : IsMultipliable f) :\n    CoeffStabilizesTo (fun i => ∏ j ∈ Finset.range (i + 1), f j) (tprod' f hf) :=\n  coeffStabilizesTo_partial_prod hf",
        "theorem coeffStabilizesTo_partial_sum'\n    {f : ℕ → PowerSeries K} (hf : IsSummable f) :\n    CoeffStabilizesTo (fun i => ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (i + 1), f j) (tsum' f hf) :=\n  coeffStabilizesTo_partial_sum hf",
        "theorem coeffStabilizesTo_mul'\n    {f g : ℕ → PowerSeries K} {lf lg : PowerSeries K}\n    (hf : CoeffStabilizesTo f lf) (hg : CoeffStabilizesTo g lg) :\n    CoeffStabilizesTo (fun i => f i * g i) (lf * lg) := by\n  intro n\n  -- Step 1: Get stabilization bounds for x^n-equivalence\n  obtain ⟨K_f, hK_f⟩ := exists_xnEquiv_of_coeffStabilizesTo hf n\n  obtain ⟨K_g, hK_g⟩ := exists_xnEquiv_of_coeffStabilizesTo hg n\n  -- Step 2: Take P = max{K_f, K_g}\n  let P := max K_f K_g\n  use P\n  intro i hi\n  -- Step 3: For i ≥ P, we have f_i ≡[x^n] lf and g_i ≡[x^n] lg\n  have hf_equiv : xnEquiv n (f i) lf := hK_f i (le_of_max_le_left hi)\n  have hg_equiv : xnEquiv n (g i) lg := hK_g i (le_of_max_le_right hi)\n  -- Step 4: By multiplicativity, f_i * g_i ≡[x^n] lf * lg\n  have h_prod := xnEquiv_mul hf_equiv hg_equiv\n  -- Step 5: Extract the n-th coefficient equality\n  exact h_prod n (le_refl n)",
        "theorem coeffStabilizesTo_add'\n    {f g : ℕ → PowerSeries K} {lf lg : PowerSeries K}\n    (hf : CoeffStabilizesTo f lf) (hg : CoeffStabilizesTo g lg) :\n    CoeffStabilizesTo (fun i => f i + g i) (lf + lg) := by\n  intro n\n  -- Step 1: Get stabilization bounds for x^n-equivalence\n  obtain ⟨K_f, hK_f⟩ := exists_xnEquiv_of_coeffStabilizesTo hf n\n  obtain ⟨K_g, hK_g⟩ := exists_xnEquiv_of_coeffStabilizesTo hg n\n  -- Step 2: Take P = max{K_f, K_g}\n  let P := max K_f K_g\n  use P\n  intro i hi\n  -- Step 3: For i ≥ P, we have f_i ≡[x^n] lf and g_i ≡[x^n] lg\n  have hf_equiv : xnEquiv n (f i) lf := hK_f i (le_of_max_le_left hi)\n  have hg_equiv : xnEquiv n (g i) lg := hK_g i (le_of_max_le_right hi)\n  -- Step 4: By additivity, f_i + g_i ≡[x^n] lf + lg\n  have h_sum := xnEquiv_add hf_equiv hg_equiv\n  -- Step 5: Extract the n-th coefficient equality\n  exact h_sum n (le_refl n)"
      ]

        ]
